blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 45 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 40".
